name: Shurgard Self Storage S.A.
summary: Shurgard Self Storage S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition, development, and operation of self-storage facilities for business and personal use. The company also offers various ancillary services at its self-storage facilities consisting of sale of storage products and provision of protection through an independent insurance company for customers' stored goods. As of February 24, 2021, it owned and operated 245 self-storage facilities that covered an approximately 1.2 million net rentable square meters under the Shurgard brand name in the Netherlands, France, Sweden, the United Kingdom, Belgium, Germany, and Denmark; and two third party facilities in France. The company serves approximately 165,000 customers. Shurgard Self Storage S.A. was founded in 1995 and is based in Luxembourg, Luxembourg.
